title: agathophytum bonus-henricus
intro: Agathophytum bonus-henricus, also known as Ajuga reptans, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agathophytum bonus-henricus include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems.
